title: Dripex Kids Easel, Children's Wooden Art Easel Foldable, Double-Sided Magnetic Blackboard & Whiteboard for Kids and Toddlers, Chalkboard with Painting Art Supplies
features: 【ALL-IN-1 Kids Easel】Dripex childrens easel can not only be used for blackboards, whiteboards, drawing paper, but also use magnetic stickers on both sides. Start a fun alphabet and number game, stimulate your child's imagination and creativity!

【Free Assembly & Foldable】Only need to assemble the roll paper part, you can get a complete children's easel. More simple and labor-saving! Easily folded without removing screws, making it easier to store and carry!

【Creative tools】Our double-sided kids easel includes Paper holder, colorful magnetic letter and math set, 6 magnetic clasps, 3 marker pens, 1 box of dust-free chalk, 2 erasers and 1 ruler. For two children to play at the same time!

【Adjustable Height】This kids art easel can adjust from 88.5 cm to 105 cm, suitable for kids from 3 and up years old. Height change meets your child's growth needs from counting to graffiti to art. Accompanies your child from enlightenment to creation!

【High Quality】This easel for toddlers is made of high-quality sturdy wood, With non-slip feet, stable and safe. To further ensure the safety of children, the easel was all polished and the inverted corners are also rounded to avoid wear and bumps. The best gift for children！
